name: leomazzi_cyto_spleen
label: Leomazzi Spleen Cytometry
summary: Flow cytometry data of spleens of 8 mice. For each mouse, aliquotes of the same original sample were divided into 2 batches and measured with 2 different instrument settings to allow the creation of sample-paired replicates for benchmarking purposes.
description: Flow cytometry data of spleens from 4 WT (IKK2 fl/fl CD11c-cre +/+) and 4 KO (IKK2 fl/fl CD11c-cre Tg/+) B6 mice, measured with a 22-color panel and 2 different instrument settings. Data has been preprocessed (compensated with a batch-specific compensation matrix, logicle transformed, cleaned with PeacoQC and pregated on live single CD45+ cells).
